# One Stop Outdoor Construction

> Family-owned outdoor construction company serving Richmond, Katy, Houston, Sugar Land, and Rosenberg, Texas. 15+ years of experience building custom patio covers, outdoor kitchens, concrete driveways, pergolas, and residential roofing. Licensed, insured, and BBB-accredited. Owned and operated by David Arabzadeh since 2011.

## Key Facts

- **Business Name:** One Stop Outdoor Construction
- **Owner:** David Arabzadeh (Owner & Lead Contractor, since 2011)
- **Phone:** (832) 945-8084
- **Address:** Richmond, TX 77407
- **Service Area:** Richmond, Katy, Houston, Sugar Land, Rosenberg, Missouri City, Fulshear, Stafford, Pearland, Cinco Ranch, Greatwood, Pecan Grove (greater Houston / Fort Bend County)
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 8am–5pm
- **Rating:** 5.0 stars, 32+ Google reviews
- **Credentials:** Licensed general contractor, fully insured, BBB A+ accredited, 2025 Nextdoor Neighborhood Favorite
- **Languages:** English, Spanish
- **Founded:** 2011

## Primary Services

- [Patio Covers](https://onestopoutdoorconstruction.com/services/patio-covers): Custom lattice, solid insulated, and aluminum patio covers with optional skylights and ceiling fans.
- [Concrete & Driveways](https://onestopoutdoorconstruction.com/services/concrete-driveways): Stamped concrete, colored concrete, decorative concrete, driveways, walkways, patios.
- [Outdoor Kitchens](https://onestopoutdoorconstruction.com/services/outdoor-kitchens): Custom outdoor kitchens with built-in grills, countertops, stone veneer, and full outdoor living builds.
- [Pergolas](https://onestopoutdoorconstruction.com/services/pergolas): Custom pergola design and installation for shade and outdoor living.
- [Roofing](https://onestopoutdoorconstruction.com/services/roofing): Residential roofing — shingle, metal, and flat roofs.
- [Walkways & Pavers](https://onestopoutdoorconstruction.com/services/walkways-pavers): Flagstone, slate, and natural-stone paver walkways.

## What Makes Us Different

- Owner-operated since 2011 — David Arabzadeh is on every job, not a call-center.
- 70% of jobs come from repeat clients and referrals.
- Free on-site estimates with no obligation.
- Full liability insurance on every project.
- Fort Bend County HOA-approval experience.
- Bilingual English/Spanish crew.

## Typical Questions This Site Answers

- How much does a patio cover cost in Richmond / Katy / Houston TX?
- What's the difference between lattice, solid, and aluminum patio covers?
- What's included in a stamped concrete patio install?
- How long does an outdoor kitchen build take?
- Do you handle HOA approvals in Fort Bend County?
- Are you licensed and insured?
- How fast can you start a project?
